message:
test(readme): JoinedSeries field-level functional coverage

JoinedSeries is the return type of join_series. Its 3 public fields
(index, left_values, right_values) were reachable from the prelude
but never asserted. The existing test only verified the type
compiles. A regression in join_series alignment logic — for example,
mismatched index/value lengths or wrong join row counts — would not
have surfaced.

Adds readme_joined_series_fields_round_trip — reachable via prelude
alone — that drives 3 join modes against partially-overlapping series
(s_a labels {0,1,2} + s_b labels {1,2,3}):

- Inner: shared labels {1,2}    → index/left/right each len 2
- Left:  all left labels {0,1,2} → index/left/right each len 3
- Outer: union {0,1,2,3}         → index/left/right each len 4

Each assertion verifies all 3 field arrays stay length-aligned to the
index (a regression that produced one short field would surface).

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.49.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
